enabled.description: Master on/off. When false the module's endpoints return 404.

maxItems.description: How many recently-viewed products the GET surface returns (newest first). Clamped to [1, 50].

excludeCategories.description: Category ids whose products are never surfaced in the recently-viewed list. A view whose product belongs to one of these categories is filtered out of the GET result. See README 'Category exclusion (runtime gap)'.
